title: LightAuth
description: A lightweight and secure account registration and login system for your Minecraft server.
body:
![w](https://i.ibb.co/zWfKK41T/lightauthwwww.png)

### LightAuth - Secure and Flexible Account Registration and Login System

**LightAuth** - Secure and Flexible Account Registration & Login System
LightAuth is a lightweight, performance-focused authorization plugin that secures player logins on your Minecraft server. It provides premium-level security even when running your server in cracked mode.
Join our **Discord server** for support, bug reports, or suggestions!

---

### Features

- **Secure Login:**  
  Enhance security with a password verification system.  

- **Restrict Unauthorized Actions:**  
  Block movements, commands, and other actions for unauthorized players.  

- **Automatic Timeout:**  
  Automatically disconnect players who fail to log in within a set time.  

- **Command Whitelist:**  
  Allow only specific commands before players log in.  

- **Configurable Settings:**  
  Easily customize commands, messages, and all other settings via the configuration file.
  
- **IP-Based Login Bypass Feature**
The IP-based login bypass feature allows players to skip the authentication process for a     specified period based on their IP address. This feature helps prevent players from having to log in repeatedly and is especially useful for players connecting from the same network.

- **Web Management Panel**
View all registered players, change passwords, and unregister via browser (easy administration).

- **Post-Authentication Commands**: Automatically execute custom commands after players register or login with individual enable/disable toggles for each event.

- **Multiple Storage Support:** Store player data in YAML, JSON, SQLite, H2, or MySQL databases with easy migration and backup system.

- **Password Hash + Mask Dual Layer:** BCrypt hash for security (cannot be reversed) and XOR mask for admin/web display (can be reversed).

- **Migration & Backup System:** Easily transfer data between storage types with automatic backup before migration to prevent data loss.


---

### Commands

- `/register <password> <password>`: Allows new players to register.
- `/login <password>`: Lets players log in.
- `/changepassword <old password> <new password>`: Change password.
- `/forcechangepassword <player> <new password>`: Force change any player's password.
- `/lightauth info <player>`: Shows detailed player info (reg date, last login, IP, UUID etc.)
- `/lightauth password <player>`: View a player's current password.
- `/unregister <player>`: Remove a player's registration.
- `/lightauth website` : Displays the web panel URL. 

---

### Why Choose LightAuth?

- Performance-focused and reliable solution.  
- Easy-to-configure settings.  
- Modern security measures to improve player experience.  

---
